summary: UX/Accessibility audit cycle #2. 9 findings (4 HIGH, 3 MEDIUM, 2 LOW). Major: AccessibilitySystem exists but is not registered as autoload and has zero game integration. PlatformManager.get_ui_scale() is defined but never called in any game script. MenuPrincipalMerlin all buttons have FOCUS_NONE disabling keyboard/gamepad nav. Implementing LLM-STAT-1 (P10 highest-priority dev): last_ttft_ms never set in non-streaming path.

findings.description: AccessibilitySystem (colorblind modes, text_scale, high_contrast, reduced_motion) is NOT registered as autoload in project.godot. The class exists and is fully implemented but has zero game integration. Colorblind corrections and text scaling are dead code.
findings.impact: All accessibility features (colorblind, high contrast, reduced motion) are completely non-functional in-game.
findings.fix: Register AccessibilitySystem as autoload in project.godot. Wire to MenuOptions.gd with new Accessibility section.

findings.description: PlatformManager.get_ui_scale() and get_base_font_size() are defined but NEVER called by any game script. Confirmed by grep of all *.gd files.
findings.impact: UI does not scale on mobile/high-DPI screens. On small phones (screen.x < 800), get_ui_scale() returns 1.2 but is ignored.
findings.fix: Add PlatformManager.get_ui_scale() call to root Control nodes on _ready(), and use get_base_font_size() for font sizing.

findings.description: ALL main menu buttons have focus_mode = Control.FOCUS_NONE, preventing keyboard/gamepad navigation of the main menu.
findings.impact: Gamepad players cannot navigate the main menu at all. Keyboard tab navigation broken.
findings.fix: Change to FOCUS_ALL and set up focus neighbors for proper navigation order.

findings.description: MenuOptions has no accessibility section. ColorblindMode, text_scale, high_contrast, reduced_motion are defined in AccessibilitySystem but no UI controls exist in the options screen for the player to configure them.
findings.impact: Players cannot configure accessibility settings even if AccessibilitySystem is wired up.
findings.fix: Add Accessibility section to MenuOptions scene with: colorblind dropdown, text_scale slider, high_contrast toggle, reduced_motion toggle.

findings.description: Minigame word-choice buttons have focus_mode = Control.FOCUS_NONE. Players cannot use gamepad/keyboard to select words in the Echo minigame.
findings.impact: Minigame inaccessible without mouse/touch on gamepad or keyboard-only setups.
findings.fix: Change to FOCUS_ALL for word buttons, add focus-based selection highlight.

findings.description: hub_antre_tour.gd:115 uses direct Input.is_action_just_pressed() and Input.is_mouse_button_pressed() bypassing InputAdapter, breaking touch/gamepad abstraction for tutorial interaction.
findings.impact: Tutorial interaction may not work correctly on gamepad-only or touch-only inputs.
findings.fix: Replace with InputAdapter method or connect_to button pressed signal.

findings.description: calendar_tabs.gd:377 lock_btn and reroll_btn have FOCUS_NONE. Calendar controls cannot be reached by keyboard/gamepad.
findings.fix: Change to FOCUS_ALL for actionable calendar buttons.

findings.description: FONT_SIZE_ZONE = 11 — zone label is exactly at the minimum font size. On mobile at 1.2x scale this renders as ~13px. However on web at 1x it's at the absolute floor. Consider bumping to 12.
findings.impact: Zone text barely readable on some screens.

findings.description: Only 20 I18nRegistry calls found across all scripts, while hundreds of French strings are hardcoded. This is a massive i18n gap. Previous specialist covered Collection.gd and HubAntre.gd, but IntroCeltOS.gd and other screens remain.
findings.impact: Game cannot be localized. Hardcoded strings will break when language is changed.
findings.fix: Systematic i18n pass — tracked via existing UX-I18N-* tasks.

passing_invariants: InputAdapter and PlatformManager ARE registered as autoloads
LLMWarmupOverlay loading state exists for LLM init
touch_active detection in InputAdapter._input() is correct
